free_text: Spectrum measurement of neutrons and gamma-rays from
thick H2-18O target bombarded with 18 MeV protons
- Chemical-form of target is H2O.
- Physical-form of target is liquid.
18O-enriched
Neutron detection efficiency determination.
AVF cyclotron(K=100) at the Takasaki
Ion Accelerators for Advanced
Radiation Application (TIARA) facility
- Detector resolution is 5 to 16 %.(The energy
resolution taken from the full width at half maximum
of the prompt gamma-ray peak.)
- organic liquid scintillator
The uncertainty of detector efficiency with
the SCINFUL-R code was estimated to be 5%. The
total normalization uncertainty was around
Statistical uncertainties were generally
bellow 10% but increased to above 10% at the
highest energy.
K.Y
Received by e-mail from M.Hagiwara
ANG is polar angle (lab.) between beam and neutron
No information on source of uncertainties
